notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the python39 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 11 CVEs: CVE-2007-4559, CVE-2022-42919, CVE-2023-24329, CVE-2023-27043, CVE-2023-40217, and 6 more.
